name: PT Voksel Electric Tbk
summary: PT Voksel Electric Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells power, telecommunication, and fiber optic cables in Indonesia. It operates through five segments: Power Cable, Fiber Optic Cable, Copper Wire Cable, Contractor Service, and Trading. The company provides bare copper conductors and bare aluminum conductors; and power and control cables, such as high and medium voltage submarine cables, low voltage cross linked polyethylene insulated cable, polyethylene insulated cables, polyvinyl chloride insulated cables, fire resistance cables, flame retardant cables, control and instrument cables, and sheath halogen free cables. It also offers optical fiber cables, which include all dielectric self supporting cables, aerial and duct cables, armor/buried cables, fibre To The Home (FTTH) and Single Core Per Tube (SCPT) cables, air blowing micro duct cables, submarine fiber optic cables, and optical ground wires, as well as supplies free market cables to contractors and distributors. In addition, the company is involved in the general trading, and development and services business; and operates as a general contractor. Further, it exports its products. PT Voksel Electric Tbk was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
